raw: The pass admits up to two people for free. The hall is open daily from 10 am to 5 pm. But be sure to check their site for early closings before you make the reservation here. The pass also give you a 15% discount at in-store purchases at the Pro Shop as well as 20% discount on Hall special ticketed events.

source_phrases.audience_policies[0].form: admits up to two people for free
